attributes.description: Alerts when the HTTP API error rate (non-2xx responses) exceeds the computed threshold. Client-visible API failures.
attributes.name: [InfluxDB OTel] HTTP API high error rate

investigation_guide.blob:
## InfluxDB HTTP API high error rate

### What fired
The ratio of non-2xx responses exceeded the threshold over a minimum 10-request sample.

### Why it matters
HTTP errors cover auth failures, malformed writes, query failures, and overload. Sustained high rates indicate client-visible API degradation.

### Triage
1. Split errors by status code to classify the failure mode.
2. Correlate with server-side metrics (compaction, cache errors).

### Remediation
- Fix the dominant failure mode.

### Tuning
- Threshold and sample size are tuned in the query; adjust to match traffic.
